content:
The user wants me to extract the table and text from the provided image. **1. Table Analysis:** The image contains a large table titled "Electrical Characteristics (Tj=25°C unless otherwise noted)". The table is divided into sections: - **STATIC PARAMETERS** - **DYNAMIC PARAMETERS** - **SWITCHING PARAMETERS** I need to transcribe each row and column accurately. **2. Text Analysis:** Below the table, there are several notes labeled A, B, C, D, E, F. - Note A discusses the measurement conditions for $R_{\theta JA}$. - Note B discusses power dissipation $P_D$. - Note C discusses repetitive rating and thermal resistance. - Note D discusses thermal impedance. - Note E discusses static characteristics. - Note F discusses the SOA curve. Below the notes, there is a large block of text regarding APPLICATIONS OR USES. Finally, there is a note about AOS' products and terms of sale. **3. Formatting:** I will use Markdown for the table and standard text for the notes and other information. **Step-by-step transcription:** * **Header:** * Logo: ALPHA & OMEGA SEMICONDUCTOR * Part Number: AO3400A * **Table Title:** Electrical Characteristics (Tj=25°C unless otherwise noted) * **Table Content:** * Columns: Symbol, Parameter, Conditions, Min, Typ, Max, Units * **STATIC PARAMETERS** * $BV_{DSS}$: Drain-Source Breakdown Voltage, $I_D=250\mu A, V_{GS}=0V$, 30, , , V * $I_{DSS}$: Zero Gate Voltage Drain Current, $V_{DS}=30V, V_{GS}=0V$, , , 1, $\mu A$ * (Same row continued) $T_J=55^{\circ}C$, , , 5 * $I_{GSS}$: Gate-Body leakage current, $V_{DS}=0V, V_{GS}= \pm 12V$, , , 100, nA * $V_{GS(th)}$: Gate Threshold Voltage, $V_{DS}=V_{GS} I_D=250\mu A$, 0.65, 1.05, 1.45, V * $I_{D(ON)}$: On state drain current, $V_{GS}=4.5V, V_{DS}=5V$, 30, , , A * $R_{DS(ON)}$: Static Drain-Source On-Resistance, $V_{GS}=10V, I_D=5.7A$, , 18, 26.5, $m\Omega$ * (Same row continued) $T_J=125^{\circ}C$, , 28, 38 * (Same row continued) $V_{GS}=4.5V, I_D=5A$, , 19, 32, $m\Omega$ * (Same row continued) $V_{GS}=2.5V, I_D=3A$, , 24, 48, $m\Omega$ * $g_{FS}$: Forward Transconductance, $V_{DS}=5V, I_D=5.7A$, , 33, , S * $V_{SD}$: Diode Forward Voltage, $I_S=1A, V_{GS}=0V$, , 0.7, 1, V * $I_S$: Maximum Body-Diode Continuous Current, , , , 2, A * **DYNAMIC PARAMETERS** * $C_{iss}$: Input Capacitance, $V_{GS}=0V, V_{DS}=15V, f=1MHz$, , 630, , pF * $C_{oss}$: Output Capacitance, (merged cell), , 75, , pF * $C_{rss}$: Reverse Transfer Capacitance, (merged cell), , 50, , pF * $R_g$: Gate resistance, $V_{GS}=0V, V_{DS}=0V, f=1MHz$, 1.5, 3, 4.5, $\Omega$ * **SWITCHING PARAMETERS** * $Q_g$: Total Gate Charge, $V_{GS}=4.5V, V_{DS}=15V, I_D=5.7A$, , 6, 7, nC * $Q_{gs}$: Gate Source Charge, (merged cell), , 1.3, , nC * $Q_{gd}$: Gate Drain Charge, (merged cell), , 1.8, , nC * $t_{D(on)}$: Turn-On Delay Time, $V_{GS}=10V, V_{DS}=15V, R_L=2.6\Omega, R_{GEN}=3\Omega$, , 3, , ns * $t_r$: Turn-On Rise Time, (merged cell), , 2.5, , ns * $t_{D(off)}$: Turn-Off Delay Time, (merged cell), , 25, , ns * $t_f$: Turn-Off Fall Time, (merged cell), , 4, , ns * $t_{rr}$: Body Diode Reverse Recovery Time, $I_F=5.7A, dl/dt=100A/\mu s$, , 8.5, , ns * $Q_{rr}$: Body Diode Reverse Recovery Charge, $I_F=5.7A, dl/dt=100A/\mu s$, , 2.6, , nC * **Notes:** * A. The value of $R_{\theta JA}$ is measured with the device mounted on 1in$^2$ FR-4 board with 2oz. Copper, in a still air environment with $T_A = 25^{\circ}$ C. The value in any given application depends on the user's specific board design. * B. The power dissipation $P_D$ is based on $T_{J(MAX)}=150^{\circ}$ C, using $\le 10s$ junction-to-ambient thermal resistance. * C. Repetitive rating, pulse width limited by junction temperature $T_{J(MAX)}=150^{\circ}$ C. Ratings are based on low frequency and duty cycles to keep initial $T_J=25^{\circ}$ C. * D. The $R_{\theta JA}$ is the sum of the thermal impedance from junction to lead $R_{\theta JL}$ and lead to ambient. * E. The static characteristics in Figures 1 to 6 are obtained using <300$\mu$s pulses, duty cycle 0.5% max. * F. These curves are based on the junction-to-ambient thermal impedance which is measured with the device mounted on 1in$^2$ FR-4 board with 2oz. Copper, assuming a maximum junction temperature of $T_{J(MAX)}=150^{\circ}$ C. The SOA curve provides a single pulse rating. * **Applications Warning:** APPLICATIONS OR USES AS CRITICAL COMPONENTS IN LIFE SUPPORT DEVICES OR SYSTEMS ARE NOT AUTHORIZED. AOS DOES NOT ASSUME ANY LIABILITY ARISING OUT OF SUCH APPLICATIONS OR USES OF ITS PRODUCTS. AOS RESERVES THE RIGHT TO MAKE CHANGES TO PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS WITHOUT NOTICE. IT IS THE RESPONSIBILITY OF THE CUSTOMER TO EVALUATE SUITABILITY OF THE PRODUCT FOR THEIR INTENDED APPLICATION. CUSTOMER SHALL COMPLY WITH APPLICABLE LEGAL REQUIREMENTS, INCLUDING ALL APPLICABLE EXPORT CONTROL RULES, REGULATIONS AND LIMITATIONS. * **Product Note:** AOS' products are provided subject to AOS' terms and conditions of sale which are set forth at: http://www.aosmd.com/terms_and_conditions_of_sale * **Footer:** Rev 3.1: July 2023 www.aosmd.com Page 2 of 5 I will now construct the final output. ```json [{"bbox": [132, 43, 361, 77], "category": "figure", "text": ""}, {"bbox": [790, 45, 883, 60], "category": "header", "text": "AO3400A"}, {"bbox": [134, 109, 540, 124], "category": "title", "text": "Electrical Characteristics (Tj=25°C unless otherwise noted)"}, {"bbox": [131, 138, 883, 602], "category": "table", "text": "

STATIC PARAMETERS

IDSSZero Gate Voltage Drain CurrentVDS=30V, VGS=0V1μA

VGS=4.5V, ID=5A1932mΩ
VGS=2.5V, ID=3A2448mΩ
gFSForward TransconductanceVDS=5V, ID=5.7A33S
VSDDiode Forward VoltageIS=1A, VGS=0V0.71V
ISMaximum Body-Diode Continuous Current2A
DYNAMIC PARAMETERS
